fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the work center.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Alternate Work Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate work center.

fields.name: Work Center Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the work center group, if the work center or underlying machine center is assigned to a work center group.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Subcontractor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of a subcontractor who supplies this work center.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the center's cost that includes indirect costs, such as machine maintenance.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Queue Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the queue time of the work center.

fields.name: Queue Time Unit of Meas. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the queue time unit of measure code.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the work center card was last modified.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity of the work center.

fields.name: Efficiency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the efficiency factor as a percentage of the work center.

fields.name: Maximum Efficiency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum efficiency factor of the work center.

fields.name: Minimum Efficiency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum efficiency factor of the work center.

fields.name: Calendar Rounding Precision
fields.tooltip: Specifies how calendar entries are rounded, such as whether minutes are rounded to hours.

fields.name: Simulation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the simulation type for the work center.

fields.name: Shop Calendar Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shop calendar code that the planning of this work center refers to.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the work center is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example, if the machine center is out of order.

fields.name: Capacity (Effective)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the effective available capacity of the work center.

fields.name: Prod. Order Need (Qty.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated capacity requirements for production orders at this work center.

fields.name: Unit Cost Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost calculation that is to be made.

fields.name: Specific Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies where to define the unit costs. If you place a check mark in this field, you can define the unit costs on the routing line. This allows you to have individual costs on every routing line. This is useful for subcontracting operations with varying rates.

fields.name: Consolidated Calendar
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the consolidated calendar is used.

fields.name: Flushing Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method to use to calculate and handle output at the work center. Manual: Output must be posted manually by using the output journal. Forward: Output is automatically calculated and posted when you change the status of a simulated, planned (or firm planned) production order to Released. You can still post output manually from the output journal. Backward: Output is automatically calculated and posted when you change the status of a released production order to Finished or when the last operation is finished. You can still post output manually from the output journal. The setting you make in this field is copied to the Flushing Method field on the production order routing line according to the machine/work center of the master routing, but you can change the field for an individual production order to allow a different output (or consumption) posting of that order.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the overhead rate of this work center.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the work center operates by default.

fields.name: Open Shop Floor Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin that functions as the default open shop floor bin at the work center.

fields.name: To-Production Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin in the production area where components that are picked for production are placed by default before they can be consumed.

fields.name: From-Production Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin in the production area where finished end items are taken by default when the process involves warehouse activity.
